title: dysoxylum macrocarpum var. sumatranum
intro: Dysoxylum macrocarpum var. sumatranum, also known as the Sumatran Dysoxylum, is a plant species within the family Meliaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing, as well as possessing potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and salves, which are used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
